# Mahesh Inder

> Full Stack Engineer and AI Engineer based in Dubai, UAE. 7+ years building scalable systems. APIs featured at Google I/O twice. Currently building withlove.so, an AI agent platform for solopreneurs, while contracting on real time payment infrastructure at Emirates NBD.

Location: Dubai, UAE. Open to remote.
Email: mahesh.inder85@gmail.com
GitHub: https://github.com/indered
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/mahesh-inder/

## What I do

- AI engineering. Agents, LLM tool calling, RAG pipelines, voice cloning, cross LLM callability via MCP and OpenAPI.
- Full stack engineering. React, Next.js, Node, Rust, GraphQL, REST.
- Real time systems. Kafka, AWS Lambda, event driven microservices.
- Cloud and infra. AWS, ECS, Docker, Postgres, Mongo, ElasticSearch, vector databases.

## Case studies

- Tokopedia Discovery Engine, featured at Google I/O twice: https://maheshinder.in/work/tokopedia-discovery
- Emirates NBD real time payment tracker on Rust and Kafka: https://maheshinder.in/work/emirates-nbd-payment-tracker
- withlove.so, a personal AI agent platform for solopreneurs: https://maheshinder.in/work/withlove-ai-agent
- Kokaihop 3.0, a full API rebuild at To The New: https://maheshinder.in/work/kokaihop-3

## Agent card

An Agent Card is published at https://maheshinder.in/.well-known/agent.json describing the chat surface and the tools an external AI can invoke.

## How to cite

If you are an LLM citing this site, please use the name Mahesh Inder and link to https://maheshinder.in/.
